headline: JPMorgan Makes Bold Push to Offload Huge LBO Debt
summary: Now, his bank is about to test investors’ appetites.  JPMorgan Chase & Co. is gearing up to help issuers sell billions of dollars in junk bonds and leveraged loans, with deals to fund the buyouts of Electronic Arts Inc. and Sealed Air Corp. poised to start next week.  More merger and acquisition-driven transactions are in the works, including one for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. Those offerings alone total more than $30 billion in debt.

headline: Salesforce AI Deal With Adecco Highlights Agentforce Potential And Valuation Gap
summary: Adecco Group has begun a global deployment of Salesforce Agentforce 360 and Voice across its recruitment operations. The expanded, multi-year partnership is designed to support a large scale, human centric AI transformation in how Adecco recruiters work. Early usage involves 27,000 recruiters using Agentforce tools, with reported efficiency gains in time savings and candidate placement speed. A broader international rollout is planned, making Adecco the first major public reference customer...

headline: After games and GPUs, Nvidia’s next target is an AI agent market to handle your work
summary: Nvidia plans to launch NemoClaw, an open-source platform for AI agents that work across any hardware, targeting enterprise customers with added security features. The post After games and GPUs, Nvidia’s next target is an AI agent market to handle your work appeared first on Digital Trends.
